benchmarks.label: CALVIN
benchmarks.detail: Suites: 5 tasks 91.2 | Figure 7(a) | Notes: ABC→D split with avg_len metric reported as 4.72. 5-Task SR = 91.2%.

benchmarks.label: LIBERO
benchmarks.detail: Suites: libero spatial 85.7 · libero object 75.3 · libero goal 70.7 · libero 10 45.2 | Table 1 | Notes: All 4 standard LIBERO suites present (Spatial, Object, Goal, Long=libero_10). Training uses 1-shot (1 demo per task) instead of standard 50 demos/task. 1-shot is a valid reduced-data regime per benchmark rules.

benchmarks.label: LIBERO-Plus
benchmarks.detail: Tasks: reported avg 79.4 | Table 1 | Notes: Paper reports per-LIBERO-suite averages (Spatial 88.1, Object 79.0, Goal 70.2, Long 80.3) rather than per-perturbation-dimension scores (camera, robot, language, light, background, noise, layout).
